title: 61% of Americans Said They Had to Cut Back on Groceries
description: More than three quarters of Americans, including 55 percent of Republicans, said President Trump’s policies have increased the cost of living in their community.
author: Ruth Igielnik

title: How to Stay Safe Around Jellyfish This Beach Season
description: Jellyfish myths and misconceptions abound. Here’s how to stay safe this beach season around these gelatinous wonders.
author: Johnny Diaz

title: How a Chemical Tank in Southern California Came to the Brink of Disaster
description: Firefighters are left without any options to prevent the tank, filled with a toxic chemical, from collapsing or exploding. The authorities have urged thousands of people to evacuate their homes.
author: Soumya Karlamangla

title: Trump’s Pursuit of a Partnership With China Raises Concerns in India
description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has a “gargantuan task” during his visit to Delhi: defuse tensions over President Trump’s anti-India aggression and overtures to China.
author: Edward Wong

title: Trump, Defiant After Bad Week, Pushes Ahead on Politically Unpopular Ideas
description: President Trump continues to act like he’s politically all-powerful, even in the face of indications that he is not.
author: Luke Broadwater

title: Food, Flashlights and Fans: Floridians Step Up Aid to Cuban Relatives
description: Months into the oil blockade imposed by President Trump, many Cubans are relying more than ever on relatives in the U.S. for help meeting their daily needs.
author: David C. Adams, Andrea Zarate and David Ovalle

title: A Route 66 Road Trip in Cars of the Past, Present and Future
description: Before cars could drive themselves, the Mother Road beckoned Americans westward. We drove a long stretch of it to assess the health of the old road while sizing up the next automotive century.
author: Jamie Lincoln Kitman and Gabriella Angotti-Jones

title: How $6 Gas Prices Are Affecting the Lives of Californians
description: California is the nation’s most expensive state for gasoline. The latest spike has forced more residents to change their habits.
author: Orlando Mayorquín, Jill Cowan and Soumya Karlamangla

title: Here’s the latest.
description: Evacuation orders were issued to residents in parts of Orange County after a chemical leak that was initially reported on Thursday grew more serious.
author: Pooja Salhotra

title: Garden Grove residents rush to safety, with no idea when they can go home.
author: Rebecca Fairley Raney

title: Trump Weighs His Options in Carrying Out New Strikes in Iran
description: There is no shortage of targets if he decides to strike: Energy facilities left untouched, the deep underground nuclear storage site at Isfahan and missile sites that appear to have been dug out.
author: David E. Sanger, Eric Schmitt, Tyler Pager, Jonathan Swan and Julian E. Barnes

title: HUD Moves to Limit Assistance Animals for Disabled Tenants
description: Housing officials were told to exclude emotional support animals and tighten the definition of a service animal when granting accommodations for disabled tenants.
author: Chris Cameron and Debra Kamin

title: What is GKN Aerospace, the Company Whose California Plant Is at Risk of Exploding?
description: A chemical leak occurred at one of the company’s manufacturing plants in California, raising concerns about an explosion.
author: Pooja Salhotra and Niraj Chokshi

title: Garden Grove Is a Suburban City Near Theme Parks
description: The city is home to part of Little Saigon, the cultural heart of the Vietnamese American population in California.
author: Amy Graff

title: Green Card Seekers Must Leave U.S. to Apply, Trump Administration Says
description: The change is likely to affect hundreds of thousands of people. It could also lead to more family separations as spouses or relatives wait for application decisions, immigration lawyers said.
author: Madeleine Ngo and Albert Sun

title: Lawsuit Argues Trump’s $1.8 Billion Fund Excludes Those He Targeted
description: The constellation of individuals and groups involved claims to have suffered partisan attacks by the federal government under Trump, yet would not be compensated.
author: Zach Montague

title: What Is Methyl Methacrylate, the Chemical at the Center of the Garden Grove Crisis?
description: The E.P.A. warns that short-term exposure to the compound can cause skin and eye irritation and respiratory issues.
author: Emily Baumgaertner Nunn

title: In Dissecting 2024 Loss, Democrats’ Report Ignores Gaza, Biden’s Age
description: The nearly 200-page draft autopsy indicated that the party had failed to fully grapple with why Kamala Harris had lost to Donald J. Trump.
author: Lisa Lerer and Tim Balk

title: Meth and Fentanyl Found in Home Where Emergency Responders Fell Ill
description: More than a dozen emergency workers were treated after responding to a report of an overdose at a New Mexico home.
author: Mark Walker

title: Tulsi Gabbard Resigns as Director of National Intelligence. Trump Names Aaron Lukas Acting Chief.
description: Ms. Gabbard had a difficult tenure in the Trump administration and was seldom seen in the room when the president made important national-security moves.
author: Dustin Volz and Julian E. Barnes
